description_long: This jewelry piece features a central, metallic, copper-toned sphere with a hammered texture, encircled by two smooth, dark metallic rings reminiscent of planetary orbits. Around the equator of the sphere is a band adorned with small, star-shaped embellishments, adding a celestial theme. Several dark blue, faceted gemstones are suspended around the main form, attached to thin, curved metallic arms that radiate outward. Two smaller copper spheres float above and beside the main body, further enhancing the orbital motif. The overall design is highly sculptural, evoking the image of a miniature solar system or an abstract planetary model. The combination of metallic and gemstone elements gives the piece a luxurious and otherworldly appearance.
description: A copper-toned, hammered sphere encircled by metallic rings and adorned with star motifs and blue gemstones, resembling a miniature solar system. The design is sculptural and celestial, with floating spheres and curved arms.
description_view_0: The central sphere and its hammered texture are prominent, with two metallic rings and a star-studded band clearly visible. Three blue gemstones and two floating copper spheres are seen orbiting the main form.
description_view_1: The view highlights the curved metallic arms extending outward, with the blue gemstones more separated and the floating copper spheres appearing more elevated and spaced apart.
description_view_2: The star motifs on the equatorial band are visible, and the gemstones appear more dispersed, with the metallic rings and arms forming a dynamic, swirling pattern.
description_view_3: The arrangement of the metallic arms and floating spheres is more apparent, with the gemstones positioned at varying distances from the central sphere, emphasizing the orbital design.
